chunks.title: Exclusion of Foreigners
chunks.reason: Reading of the law regarding Ammonites and Moabites and the resulting separation.

chunks.title: Restoration of Temple Chambers
chunks.reason: Narrative of Nehemiah returning to Jerusalem and correcting the misuse of temple storage.

chunks.title: Observance of the Sabbath
chunks.reason: Account of Nehemiah enforcing Sabbath rest and closing the city gates.

chunks.title: Marriage to Foreign Women
chunks.reason: Narrative of Nehemiah addressing intermarriage and purifying the priesthood.

chunks.title: Final Reforms and Prayer
chunks.reason: Summary of administrative fixes and a concluding prayer for remembrance.
